title: One Nation, an Anti-Immigration Party in Australia, Rises in Polls After Bondi Massacre
author: Victoria Kim
fullText: Pauline Hanson and her One Nation party have become more palatable for some Australians after the mass shooting at Bondi Beach.
summary: Pauline Hanson and her One Nation party have become more palatable for some Australians after the mass shooting at Bondi Beach.
